calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Apperances:
Appellant: William Zurn appearing in Pro Per.
Respondent: Jeffrey Malek appearing in Pro Per.

This matter came on calendar this day having been continued from Department 206 for court trial.

Jeffrey Malek testifies on his own behalf, Plaintiff/Respondent.

William Zurn testifies on his own behalf, Defendant/Appellant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, aftering reviewing court filed documents and hearing oral argument, the Court grants Jeffrey Malek, Plaintiff/Respondent motion to vacate the appeal due to lack of jurisdiction for untimely filing.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Not Reported

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Continued To Jun-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Continued To Jun-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am
Judge Pro Tem Michelle brent, clerk Jean Kong, D525,not reported.
Cause called for Small claims Appeal. Appellant, William Zurn appears as pro per with witness Randall Krenzin; respondent, Jeffrey Malex appears as pro per, no appearance by Sandra Malek; Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Brent.

respondent, Jeffrey Malex request dismissal of appeal due to appeal filed untimely per rule 116.750. Appellant informed the judge that he did not know the time limit or rule on appeal. He sent the appeal on April 17, 2014. Mr. Krenain and Mr. Zurn informed Judge Brant that they have sent in the Notice of appeal at the same time (April 17); Mr. Krenzin informed Judge that he has proof that he sent the Notice and will submit to the Court.

9:47am

Matter is Undersubmission

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Judgment Entered
